'''Voralla Morbo''' was [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who owned the [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferran]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] [[Morbo's Place]]. She was sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], helping transport [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] and keeping a docking bay clear for them.

She had a history with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] after a shipment of [[Novanian grog/Legends|Norvanian grog]] went undelivered, and slugged him at the end of the [[Mission to Thyferra (Galactic Civil War)|mission]] to Thyferra.

She passed on information about an Imperial plot using contaminated bacta on [[Delrakkin/Legends|Delrakkin]].

She wore dark green coveralls and high boots, and wore her hair short.
